name: ASRock B860M-X WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-9066+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.3

description: Budget micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E.
